message:
fix: only fetch from confirmed-reachable clusters in security cards (#3180)

Change cluster reachability filter from `reachable !== false` to
`reachable === true` in all security compliance hooks and shared
fetchers. The old filter let through clusters with `reachable: undefined`
(health check not yet completed), which then timed out in the kubectl
proxy queue (4 concurrent, 10s timeout) and blocked reachable clusters
from returning data. This caused "Refresh failed" on all security
compliance cards (Trivy, Kubescape, Kyverno, RBAC, CertManager, ISO
27001) when any cluster was unreachable.

Fixes: security compliance cards showing "Refresh failed" when
unreachable clusters are present.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
